system.description:
Discipline: Waijia
Skill: Light Melee Against Evade
Type: Normal
Qi: 2

You dip the tips of your fly-whisk in venom and flick it with explosive force, causing the droplets to move so fast they penetrate skin. Roll Light Melee against Evade against 1 target. On a Success you do no Damage but expose the target to the poison. On a Total Success the person also takes 1d10 Damage. On a Failure it sprays or splashes on a random person near the target (Roll 1d10: In front of target 1-2, Behind target 3-4, Left of target 5-7, Right of target 8-10). This is considered a thrown Attack and has a range of 5 feet per Rank of Waijia. Requirement: This Technique requires you physically have the poison you wish to use. Cathartic: This can strike multiple targets, up to 1 per Rank of Qi. Range also doubles to 10 feet per Rank of Waijia.
system.source: Wandering Heroes of Ogre Gate, Chapter 3: Kung Fu Techniques
system.requirementNotes: This Technique requires you physically have the poison you wish to use.
system.catharticEffect: This can strike multiple targets, up to 1 per Rank of Qi. Range also doubles to 10 feet per Rank of Waijia.
